---
title: "Multivariable calculus: Exercises"
toc: true
---

# 20 Triple integrals, part 1

Attempt as many of problems 1-51 odd in [this](./text/20ex-triple-integrals-part-1.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/20ex-triple-integrals-part-1-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}, under the heading Section 16.3.
